methodology: Cross-reference ML training window requirements (v4.0 §T3b) against backfill_depth_days in forge.metric_catalog and source data availability (T3_api_depth.json audit). Floor dates from T3b audit findings.
gate_status: PASS — all 5 models have viable training windows

derivatives_pressure.bottleneck: Coinalyze pre-Feb-2022 degraded (OI at 3.4%). Effective floor = Feb 2022.
derivatives_pressure.blc01_note: BLC-01 tick liquidations EXCLUDED from initial training. Use Coinalyze aggregated. BLC-01 becomes ML-relevant ~Jul 2027 (450 days accumulated).

conditions: NVT proxy decision finalized (CoinMetrics transfer_volume vs Etherscan-derived)
capital_flow_direction.bottleneck: Etherscan backfill is 24-48h at free tier. NVT depends on CoinMetrics redistribution or Etherscan-derived alternative.

conditions: Add 3 FRED series (already available, need EDS adapter registration)
macro_regime.bottleneck: None — FRED data goes back decades. DXY (DTWEXBGS) starts 2006, post-floor.

defi_stress.bottleneck: DeFiLlama lending started mid-2021 — 6 months after floor. Lending features sparse for first 6 months of window.

volatility_regime.bottleneck: Derivatives features only available from 2021-03 — model uses price-only features before that date.

key_risks: CoinMetrics redistribution blocked — NVT proxy depends on alternative source
DeFiLlama lending history starts mid-2021, creating sparse window for DeFi Stress model
Coinalyze pre-2022 data quality degraded — do not extend derivatives floor backward
BLC-01 excluded from ML until Jul 2027 (insufficient history)
